description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Find ground-floor private studios under $2,000 per month that have a private bathroom, sort them by size from largest to smallest, and add the largest option to your shortlist.
tasks.name: Find ground-floor private studios under $2,000 per month that have a private bathroom, sort them by size from largest to smallest, and add the largest option to your shortlist.
tasks.description: Find ground-floor private studios under $2,000 per month that have a private bathroom, sort them by size from largest to smallest, and add the largest option to your shortlist.

tasks.instruction: Schedule an in-person tour for a Wednesday in mid-March at 10:00 AM, indicate that mobility assistance is needed, select the visitor relationship as the resident’s daughter, and submit the tour request form.
tasks.name: Schedule an in-person tour for a Wednesday in mid-March at 10:00 AM, indicate that mobility assistance is needed, select the visitor relationship as the resident’s daughter, and submit the tour request form.
tasks.description: Schedule an in-person tour for a Wednesday in mid-March at 10:00 AM, indicate that mobility assistance is needed, select the visitor relationship as the resident’s daughter, and submit the tour request form.

tasks.instruction: Filter care plans to show memory care options that include at least three meals per day and cost under $3,000 per month, choose the cheapest qualifying plan, and request more information by submitting the resident details and a preferred start date.
tasks.name: Filter care plans to show memory care options that include at least three meals per day and cost under $3,000 per month, choose the cheapest qualifying plan, and request more information by submitting the resident details and a preferred start date.
tasks.description: Filter care plans to show memory care options that include at least three meals per day and cost under $3,000 per month, choose the cheapest qualifying plan, and request more information by submitting the resident details and a preferred start date.

tasks.instruction: Use the cost calculator to create a monthly estimate with a private studio, standard assisted living care, add-on services for medication management and weekly housekeeping, weekly physical therapy sessions, and transportation limited to medical appointments, then calculate and save an estimate that stays under $3,500 per month.
tasks.name: Use the cost calculator to create a monthly estimate with a private studio, standard assisted living care, add-on services for medication management and weekly housekeeping, weekly physical therapy sessions, and transportation limited to medical appointments, then calculate and save an estimate that stays under $3,500 per month.
tasks.description: Use the cost calculator to create a monthly estimate with a private studio, standard assisted living care, add-on services for medication management and weekly housekeeping, weekly physical therapy sessions, and transportation limited to medical appointments, then calculate and save an estimate that stays under $3,500 per month.

tasks.instruction: Within the activity calendar, look between the beginning and middle of April, add one music activity and one light exercise activity from that date range to the visit plan.
tasks.name: Within the activity calendar, look between the beginning and middle of April, add one music activity and one light exercise activity from that date range to the visit plan.
tasks.description: Within the activity calendar, look between the beginning and middle of April, add one music activity and one light exercise activity from that date range to the visit plan.

tasks.instruction: Complete and submit a new resident application by entering the resident and primary contact information, selecting assistance with bathing, dressing, and medication reminders as care needs, choosing assisted living in a private studio as the preferred living option, and specifying a future move-in date.
tasks.name: Complete and submit a new resident application by entering the resident and primary contact information, selecting assistance with bathing, dressing, and medication reminders as care needs, choosing assisted living in a private studio as the preferred living option, and specifying a future move-in date.
tasks.description: Complete and submit a new resident application by entering the resident and primary contact information, selecting assistance with bathing, dressing, and medication reminders as care needs, choosing assisted living in a private studio as the preferred living option, and specifying a future move-in date.

tasks.instruction: Find a free transportation service for medical appointments that operates at least three days per week, open its details, and reserve a seat for a Monday in early May at 9:00 AM for the resident, then confirm the reservation.
tasks.name: Find a free transportation service for medical appointments that operates at least three days per week, open its details, and reserve a seat for a Monday in early May at 9:00 AM for the resident, then confirm the reservation.
tasks.description: Find a free transportation service for medical appointments that operates at least three days per week, open its details, and reserve a seat for a Monday in early May at 9:00 AM for the resident, then confirm the reservation.

tasks.instruction: Using the weekly dining menus, for a Tuesday dinner in early April, find dishes marked both diabetic-friendly and low sodium with fewer than 600 calories, and add the first two qualifying dinner options to the meal plan.
tasks.name: Using the weekly dining menus, for a Tuesday dinner in early April, find dishes marked both diabetic-friendly and low sodium with fewer than 600 calories, and add the first two qualifying dinner options to the meal plan.
tasks.description: Using the weekly dining menus, for a Tuesday dinner in early April, find dishes marked both diabetic-friendly and low sodium with fewer than 600 calories, and add the first two qualifying dinner options to the meal plan.

tasks.instruction: From the staff directory, locate the Director of Nursing and use their contact form to send a question about medication management, selecting the clinical care department and requesting an email copy of the message.

expected_values.subject: Question about medication management support
expected_values.message: I would like to understand how evening medication reminders are handled for residents with memory issues.
